title: Zero In Bamboo Tiki Torch, Decorative, Natural, For Gardens, Borders and Patio Areas
features: TWINPACK: Two bamboo Tiki torches for natural ambience and al-fresco evenings
GOOD QUALITY: Safety tested and durable, with 15 hour burn time
IDEAL FOR BORDERS: Stands 1.1 metres high
REFILLABLE: With Zero In Citronella Torch Oil (product code STV445. sold separately)
description: Zero In Bamboo Torches are perfect for bringing ambience to outside spaces. Fill with Zero In Citronella Torch Oil (product code STV445 sold separately), then light wick to release a sweet fragrance for atmospheric evenings in your garden. Use the cap to extinguish the flame. Read all product information before use and retain for future reference. Only use torch oil suitable for use in this product. Do not overfill the torch (maximum fill 380ml). Allow 10-15 minutes for the wick to soak up oil before lighting. Before use ensure that the wick is firmly seated in the oil canister. The wick should not exceed the top upper edge of the torch. The size of the flame is dependent on the height of the wick. Lanterns and torches may smoke when lit. Lowering the wick may reduce the flame and smoking. Always ensure the Bamboo Torches are safe, fixed, stable and always in an upright position. Store out of reach of children, store in a dry environment. WARNING: In case of small children, just a sip of lamp oil or even sucking the wick may lead to life threatening lung damage. If lamp oil is swallowed, do not induce vomiting. Seek medical advice immediately or contact a poison centre and show the warnings on the oil bottle. This product conforms to standard: EN 14059:2002 Outdoor use only
